Create Spreadsheet Row.description: Append a new row of values to a sheet.

Create Multiple Spreadsheet Rows.description: Append several rows of values at once.

Update Spreadsheet Row.description: Overwrite the values of a specific row or range.

Get Data Range.description: Read the values from a specific A1-notation range.

Lookup Spreadsheet Row.description: Find a row whose value in a given column matches a lookup value.
